title: ITP Module Content
description: Schema for module prose content stored as YAML with structured metadata and markdown content blocks.

module_code.description: Canonical module code matching modules.yaml (e.g., ITB-B, ISA-CORE)

dependencies.description: Module codes this module depends on

referenced_by.description: Module codes or cross-refs that reference this module

title.description: Full module title for rendered header

pillar.description: Pillar letter or ISA designation (e.g., B, H, ISA)

last_verified.description: Date of last factual verification pass

preamble.description: Optional prose appearing before first section (e.g., purpose statement)

footer.description: Optional closing note (remaining gaps, upgrade notes)

level.description: Markdown heading level (2=##, 3=###, etc.). Default 2 for top-level sections.

tags.description: Section-level tags (e.g., UPDATED, NEW, PRIORITY 1 GAP FILLED)

content.description: Markdown prose content for this section. May contain bullets, tables, inline tags.

subsections.description: Nested subsections (rendered at level+1 unless level is explicit)
